case_title: WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC VS. FRANCOIS PEREIRA AMORIM

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-30-2021 CONTINUED TO FEB-01-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2022 CONTINUED TO DEC-06-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMORIM, FRANCOIS PEREIRA NOTHING. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW THAT THE VEHICLE WAS SOLD IN A COMMERCIALLY REASONABLE MANNER. FACTS SHOW THAT THE SALE PRICE AND DEFICIENCY SOUGHT ARE UNCONSCIONABLE, PER JUDGE KAHN. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AMORIM, FRANCOIS PEREIRA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-14-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-08-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2021

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-16-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
